texto: Boy or girl? I had never thought about that. The men who work at the palace, they use words to govern the country and use strength to protect it. Bringing all kinds of brilliant men from the kingdom, and they all have amazing talents. But...how are they different from me?The women inside the palace, they had white skin and beautiful hair. And their clothes were fashionable, their hearts were gentle and ever changing like the snow in the wind. But...how am I anything like them?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Da Xia: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Boy or girl? I had never thought about that. The men who work at the palace, they use words to go…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, identity, palace pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e reflexao.

And their clothes were fashionable, their hearts were gentle and ever changing like the snow in the wind. But...how am I anything like them?

texto: Joy, anger, sadness, pleasure, love, evil, greed. Where is your heart at? This world is like a furnace you temper yourself, and your character. This is the same for everyone.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Da Xia: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Joy, anger, sadness, pleasure, love, evil, greed. Where is your heart at? This world is like a fu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, human, vida pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de vida e life-lessons.
